tasks.subject: Task 1: Backend — ContainerTags in model, DB schema, and store
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `ContainerTags []string` to the `Package` model, persist it as JSON in SQLite, and verify it round-trips correctly.

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/internal/model/types.go`
- Modify: `backend/internal/store/db.go`
- Modify: `backend/internal/store/packages.go`
- Test: `backend/internal/store/packages_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `model.Package` has `ContainerTags []string` with JSON tag `container_tags,omitempty`
- [ ] `db.go` schema includes `container_tags TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
- [ ] Additive migration `ALTER TABLE packages ADD COLUMN container_tags TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'` is present
- [ ] `migrateIsContainerNullable` includes `container_tags` in both the `packages_new` CREATE TABLE and the INSERT … SELECT
- [ ] `UpsertPackageState` marshals `p.ContainerTags` to JSON; `scanPackages` unmarshals it back
- [ ] `TestContainerTagsRoundtrip` passes

**Verify:** `cd /home/rdias/Work/percona-obs-dashboard/backend && go test ./internal/store/... -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/internal/model/types.go", "backend/internal/store/db.go", "backend/internal/store/packages.go", "backend/internal/store/packages_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd /home/rdias/Work/percona-obs-dashboard/backend && go test ./internal/store/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["model.Package has ContainerTags []string", "db.go schema includes container_tags column", "Additive migration present", "migrateIsContainerNullable includes container_tags", "UpsertPackageState marshals ContainerTags", "TestContainerTagsRoundtrip passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Backend — ContainerTagsTask stores all tags
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Change `client.PackageContainerTags` to return `[]string` and update `ContainerTagsTask` to assign the full list to `pkg.ContainerTags`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/internal/obs/client.go`
- Modify: `backend/internal/obs/tasks.go`
- Test: `backend/internal/obs/tasks_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `client.PackageContainerTags` signature is `(...) ([]string, error)`
- [ ] Strips image-name prefix from every tag
- [ ] `ContainerTagsTask.Run` assigns `pkg.ContainerTags = tags`
- [ ] `TestContainerTagsTask` asserts `len(pkg.ContainerTags) == 2`

**Verify:** `cd /home/rdias/Work/percona-obs-dashboard/backend && go test ./internal/obs/... -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/internal/obs/client.go", "backend/internal/obs/tasks.go", "backend/internal/obs/tasks_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd /home/rdias/Work/percona-obs-dashboard/backend && go test ./internal/obs/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PackageContainerTags returns []string", "ContainerTagsTask sets pkg.ContainerTags", "TestContainerTagsTask passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Frontend — ArtifactsPanel + App.vue wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create ArtifactsPanel.vue and wire everything in App.vue.

**Files:**
- Create: `frontend/src/components/ArtifactsPanel.vue`
- Modify: `frontend/src/App.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] ArtifactsPanel manages artifactsTab, artRepo (el9), artArch (x86_64), copiedKey
- [ ] copy() reverts after 2s
- [ ] obsRoot computed: isv:percona:ppg:{version}
- [ ] Sub-tab switcher uses borderless pill style
- [ ] App.vue mainTab defaults to 'board'
- [ ] AppHeader wired with mainTab prop and emit
- [ ] Board shown when mainTab=board; ArtifactsPanel when mainTab=artifacts
- [ ] ArtifactsPanel receives rawPackages
- [ ] vue-tsc exits 0; tab switching works in browser

**Verify:** `cd /home/rdias/Work/percona-obs-dashboard/frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/components/ArtifactsPanel.vue", "frontend/src/App.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd /home/rdias/Work/percona-obs-dashboard/frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ArtifactsPanel local state correct", "copy() reverts after 2s", "App.vue mainTab wiring correct", "rawPackages passed to ArtifactsPanel", "vue-tsc exits 0"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
